epics.title: Authentication
epics.summary: Implement multi-factor authentication for secure access.
epics.description: Develop a secure multi-factor authentication system using OTP and biometric verification for the banking portal. Ensure that the system is robust and thwart common security threats. Use React for the frontend interfaces and FastAPI for the backend authentication processes.

epics.title: Data Models
epics.summary: Create fundamental data models for the application.
epics.description: Define and implement necessary data models such as users, accounts, and transactions. Use PostgreSQL for data storage and FastAPI for backend services interfacing with the database. Normalize the database schema to ensure data integrity and optimize performance.

epics.title: Basic UI Shell
epics.summary: Develop the basic UI shell for the portal.
epics.description: Set up the foundational frontend structure using React to ensure that the application is responsive and user-friendly. This will include the basic layout, navigation, and placeholder components for the dashboard and other modules.

epics.title: Account Requests Handling
epics.summary: Enable customers to submit account opening requests.
epics.description: Develop workflows that allow customers to submit new account opening requests through the portal. Capture necessary details, validate input, and integrate with core banking systems to automate the request submission process. Implement using React for the UI and FastAPI for form processing.

epics.title: Service Modifications Processing
epics.summary: Allow users to submit requests for service modifications.
epics.description: Create functionalities for users to submit and track modifications to their existing services and account settings. This requires integrating with the core banking system APIs to update customer details in real-time. Implement with React for the user interface and FastAPI for backend processing.

epics.title: Real-time Notifications
epics.summary: Provide real-time status updates on requests.
epics.description: Implement real-time notifications for status updates and alerts pertaining to user requests, ensuring immediate feedback and communication. Use WebSocket or similar technologies to push updates to React frontend. Backend support with FastAPI.

epics.title: Email Notifications
epics.summary: Send email notifications for request updates.
epics.description: Set up email notification services to inform users about the status of their requests. Ensure secure and reliable delivery of emails using a service like SendGrid. Integrate email notification triggers in FastAPI backend.

epics.title: Core Banking Integration
epics.summary: Seamless integration with the core banking system.
epics.description: Develop integration points between the portal and the core banking system to fetch and update user data securely. Ensure robust API design and communication using FastAPI backend services.

epics.title: Interaction History
epics.summary: Maintain comprehensive history of user interactions.
epics.description: Develop modules to log and display a comprehensive history of all user interactions and transactions within the portal. Ensure data integrity and security using PostgreSQL database and FastAPI backend services.

epics.title: Document Uploads
epics.summary: Enable document uploads for incomplete applications.
epics.description: Provide functionalities that allow users to upload necessary documents directly through the portal interface. Ensure that uploaded documents are securely stored and referenced against relevant user requests. Utilize React for frontend and FastAPI for backend handling document uploads.

epics.title: Role-based Access Controls
epics.description: Develop and enforce role-based access controls to ensure users can only access features and services that align with their profile and authorization level. Implement using FastAPI for backend services and React components for compliance with security protocols.
